tasks.task: Change the speech speed during the lesson

postTestQuestions.question: It was easy to create an account.
The navigation menu was easy to understand.
The lesson library was easy to find.
Signing up for a lesson was straightforward.
The lesson controls were easy to understand.
Changing the speech speed was easy.
The quiz was easy to complete.
The progress page was easy to find and understand.
Overall, the application was easy to use.

openEndedQuestions.question: What did you like most about the application?
openEndedQuestions.answer: Den var väldigt tydlig och lättnavigerad, man hittade lätt och förstod vad allt innebar och var man skulle trycka och så.

openEndedQuestions.question: Was there any part of the navigation that confused you?
openEndedQuestions.answer: Lektionsdelen innan man kom vidare till quizfrågorna. Hon la inte märke till information i headern. När det kom till quizet klickade det dock.

openEndedQuestions.question: What was the most confusing part?
openEndedQuestions.answer: Lektionsdelen innan quizet var också det som var mest förvirrande.

openEndedQuestions.question: Was there any task that felt difficult?
What would you improve?
openEndedQuestions.answer: Lektionen känns lite oinspirerande, men annars inte.
